title: Blue's Better Zombies
description: Updates zombies to look more realistic with physics-like animations
body:
READ BEFORE USING

This resource pack works for minecraft versions 1.21.4 and below down to version 1.19.2.

Blue's Better Zombies updates zombies to be more realistic. Zombies have new, fully animated models and textures and new features that improve on the current minecraft zombie.



This resource pack adds the following standout features:

Text version of the description

Dismemberment:
If you deal enough damage to a zombie before it dies, there's a chance that its limbs might fall off.
Reanimated:
Zombies have been fully reanimated - Animations for idling, walking, attacks and death are more realistic than before.
Crawling zombies:
aby zombies are turned into regular-sized zombies that crawl at high speeds! Aim for the center of their body.
Randomized deaths:
Zombie death animations are randomized to make every kill unique.
Herobrine?
There's a small chance that Herobrine might appear in your world when using this resource pack...
Requirements:
This resource pack requires a CEM model parser to work.
There are two options for this:
Option 1:
the Entity Model Features mod + the Entity Texture Features mod.
Option 2:
Optifine.
